title: Entity Healthbars: 64x
description: Add Healthbars To All The Entities - Now In 64x
body:
## Add Healthbars To All The Entities - Now In 64x
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/entity-healthbars-64x)




[This addon requires the base pack!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/entity-healthbars) This pack adds 64x resolution healthbars to all of the entities that support OptiFine entity models! When you damage an entity, you can now see its health update live. You never need to wonder again if an entity is about to crush you, or almost dead!
